title: Send subitem list within a notification mail
excerpt: We use the button functionality to send out notifications to our vendor about new items. But the button functionality cannot be used for subitems. It would be useful to be able to choose to attach the subitem list to the…

posts.author: natalie.oyen (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: We use the button functionality to send out notifications to our vendor about new items. But the button functionality cannot be used for subitems. It would be useful to be able to choose to attach the subitem list to the notification mail.
